title: HEP Home
body: Welcome to the Health Equity Program space. Coordinator Marisol Vega.

title: HEP Volunteer Guide
body: Salesforce is the system of record for hours after 2026-09-30. HubSpot mirrors Salesforce. Airtable is legacy and no longer authoritative. 40 hour requirement. Check-in on 2026-10-17. Must reach 40 hrs by 2026-12-05 or file a written catch up plan.

title: Shift Openings Board
body: Upcoming HEP shifts through Dec 2026. Sign up in HubSpot pipeline HEP-Shifts.

title: Nursing Pathway Retention
body: SAP floor 2.50 for federal aid. Nursing Pathway Scholarship requires 3.00 for retention.

title: Dining Worker Handbook
body: Shift swap policy. All swaps must post in Slack channel dining-swaps and be approved by Ray Dennison.
